stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
The symbol located at the aerodrome of VILSHOFEN (EDMV, N48°38.11', E013°11.74') indicates a (1) _____ aerodrome with (2) _____.

options.a: (1) civil; (2) a lighted obstacle just north of the aerodrome
options.b: (1) civil; (2) an electronic aeronautical ground light (aerodrome beacon)
options.c: (1) joint civil-military; (2) a lighted runway for night operations
options.d: (1) joint civil-military; (2) a rotating aeronautical ground light (aerodrome beacon)
